---
title: "03-26-2026"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Quarto

Quarto enables you to weave together content and executable code into a finished document. To learn more about Quarto see <https://quarto.org>.

## Running Code

When you click the **Render** button a document will be generated that includes both content and the output of embedded code. You can embed code like this:

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(broom)
library(cowplot)
library(mosaic)
library(ggplot2)
f<- "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/difiore/ada-datasets/refs/heads/main/AVONETdataset1.csv"
d<- read_csv(f, col_names = TRUE)
d<- d %>%
  select(Species1, Family1, Order1, Beak.Length_Culmen, Beak.Width,
         Beak.Depth, Tarsus.Length, Wing.Length, Tail.Length, Mass, Habitat, Migration,
         Trophic.Level, Trophic.Niche, Primary.Lifestyle, Min.Latitude, Max.Latitude,
         Centroid.Latitude, Range.Size)
glimpse(d)

p1<- ggplot(data = d %>% drop_na(Trophic.Level),
            aes(x = Trophic.Level, y = log(Mass))) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  geom_jitter(alpha = 0.1)


p2<- ggplot(data = d %>% drop_na(Trophic.Level),
                    aes(x = as.factor(Migration), y = log(Mass))) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  geom_jitter(alpha  = 0.1)

density_p1<- ggplot(data = d %>% drop_na(Trophic.Level),
                    aes(x = log(Mass), fill = Trophic.Level)) +
  geom_density(alpha = 0.5) +
  coord_flip() +
  theme_void()

plot_grid(p1, density_p1, nrow = 1)



```

```{r}

```
